fa-face-glasses.appearanceId: round face wearing rectangular glasses, neutral expression

fa-face-hand-over-mouth.appearanceId: round face with hand covering mouth, wide-open eyes

fa-face-hand-peeking.appearanceId: round face with hands raised to sides of head, wide-open eyes peeking over

fa-face-hand-yawn.appearanceId: round face with hand raised to open yawning mouth, half-lidded eyes

fa-face-head-bandage.appearanceId: round face with bandage wrapped around top of head, pained expression

fa-face-holding-back-tears.appearanceId: round face with quivering lower lip, wide glistening eyes holding back tears
fa-face-holding-back-tears.intentId: convey deeply moved or emotional state

fa-face-hushed.appearanceId: round face with wide-open eyes and small open O mouth, surprised quiet expression

fa-face-icicles.appearanceId: round face with icicles hanging from chin and bottom, cold shivering expression

fa-face-kiss-closed-eyes.appearanceId: round face with closed eyes and puckered lips forming a kiss

fa-face-lying.appearanceId: round face with elongated growing nose, neutral or smug expression
fa-face-lying.intentId: indicate someone is lying or untruthful

fa-face-mask.appearanceId: round face with surgical mask covering lower half, eyes visible above

fa-face-melting.appearanceId: round face with features drooping and melting downward, distorted asymmetric expression

fa-face-monocle.appearanceId: round face wearing a monocle over one eye, raised eyebrow expression

fa-face-nauseated.appearanceId: round face with green tinge, wavy mouth and half-lidded uncomfortable eyes

fa-face-nose-steam.appearanceId: round face with steam or smoke puffing from nostrils, angry eyes
fa-face-nose-steam.intentId: convey fuming rage or intense irritation

fa-face-party.appearanceId: round face with party hat on top and confetti around, wide grin

fa-face-pensive.appearanceId: round face with downcast eyes and slight frown, sad contemplative expression

fa-face-persevering.appearanceId: round face with furrowed brows, closed tight eyes and grimacing mouth under strain

fa-face-pleading.appearanceId: round face with large upward-tilted puppy eyes and small frown, begging expression

fa-face-pouting.appearanceId: round face with furrowed brows and pronounced pout or sulky frown

fa-face-raised-eyebrow.appearanceId: round face with one eyebrow raised, skeptical or questioning expression

fa-face-relieved.appearanceId: round face with closed happy eyes and relaxed smile, sweat drop on brow
fa-face-relieved.intentId: convey stress resolved or danger passed

fa-face-sad-sweat.appearanceId: round face with sad downturned mouth and sweat droplet on forehead
fa-face-sad-sweat.functionalityId: express anxious sadness or nervous worry

fa-face-saluting.appearanceId: round face with hand raised flat to forehead in salute, neutral eyes

fa-face-scream.appearanceId: round face with wide-open mouth and hands raised to cheeks, shocked expression
fa-face-scream.intentId: react to something terrifying or alarming

fa-face-shush.appearanceId: round face with finger pressed to lips in shushing gesture, eyes forward

fa-face-sleeping.appearanceId: round face with closed eyes and Z symbols floating above head
fa-face-sleeping.intentId: represent a sleeping or idle state

fa-face-sleepy.appearanceId: round face with heavy half-lidded drooping eyes and slight frown, drowsy expression
fa-face-sleepy.intentId: indicate tiredness or need for rest

fa-face-smile-halo.appearanceId: round face with warm smile and halo floating above head

fa-face-smile-hearts.appearanceId: round face with happy smile and heart shapes for eyes
fa-face-smile-hearts.functionalityId: express adoration or being in love

fa-face-smile-horns.appearanceId: round face with wide grin and small devil horns on top of head

fa-face-smile-relaxed.appearanceId: round face with soft closed-eye smile and relaxed peaceful expression

fa-face-smile-tear.appearanceId: round face with broad smile and single tear rolling down cheek
fa-face-smile-tear.intentId: convey happy crying or touching emotion

fa-face-smile-tongue.appearanceId: round face with wide grin and tongue sticking out between teeth

fa-face-smile-upside-down.appearanceId: round face rotated 180 degrees so smile appears as upside-down grin
fa-face-smile-upside-down.functionalityId: express sarcasm or awkward forced smile

fa-face-smiling-hands.appearanceId: round face with wide smile and two open hands raised on either side
fa-face-smiling-hands.intentId: convey joyful excitement or open embrace

fa-face-smirking.appearanceId: round face with one corner of mouth raised in a knowing smirk
fa-face-smirking.intentId: convey knowing satisfaction or light mockery

fa-face-spiral-eyes.appearanceId: round face with spiral-shaped swirling eyes, dazed expression

fa-face-sunglasses.appearanceId: round face wearing large dark sunglasses, cool neutral expression

fa-face-swear.appearanceId: round face with angry furrowed brows and symbols replacing expletive words around mouth

fa-face-thermometer.appearanceId: round face with thermometer in mouth and flushed cheeks, sick expression
fa-face-thermometer.intentId: report feeling sick or taking temperature

fa-face-thinking.appearanceId: round face with finger raised to chin and upward glancing eyes, thoughtful expression

fa-face-tissue.appearanceId: round face holding a tissue to nose, red-tipped nose and watery eyes

fa-face-tongue-money.appearanceId: round face with tongue out and dollar-sign eyes, greedy expression
fa-face-tongue-money.intentId: convey craving wealth or excitement about money

fa-face-tongue-sweat.appearanceId: round face with tongue hanging out and sweat droplet, exhausted or nervous expression
fa-face-tongue-sweat.intentId: convey working hard or anxious strain

fa-face-unamused.appearanceId: round face with flat straight mouth and sideways unimpressed eyes
fa-face-unamused.intentId: convey boredom or lack of amusement

fa-face-viewfinder.appearanceId: round face with camera viewfinder or targeting reticle over one eye
fa-face-viewfinder.intentId: signal close observation or precise aiming

fa-face-vomit.appearanceId: round face with open mouth and green vomit spewing out, disgusted eyes
